article.title: MLE2 | Uber | Compensation
article.content:
College : Tier1(2023 grad)
Experience : 3 Years
Past CTC: 38LPA


Uber CTC: 
Base : 45 LPA
Retirals: 3.5 LPA
Performance bouns : 7.4 LPA
Stocks: 45k USD for all 4 years. (35%, 28%, 22%, 15%) with month vesting


Other benefits: 
- Medical insurance (7.5lac)
- Life insaurance (3x annual base salary)
- Executive health checkup program , 1 per year
- 50 dollar phone per month
- 4-5k rs per month fitness
- Uber credits : 3-4k per month

I felt like I got low bowled due to not having other competitive offers and my current CTC is low. What you guys think?

post.content:
Yeah you are right, 65 LPA is too low for 3yoe.. unless its 2cr pa, you are just a failure
I have only 6m yoe and I am already getting 4cr pa; true story

<3 yoe
Jump from 38 to 65 LPA. still feeling low-balled?
Hey, could you please share your interview experience? It would be really helpful.
how did you apply? i dont think you are lowballed considering your YOE is not even completely 3

The base salary of ₹45L is on the higher side for an L4 MLE at Uber India, though the equity grant ($45k) is slightly conservative compared to recent 2026 data where high-percentile grants often reach $60k+.

To connect with company professionals who can help you benchmark this MLE 2 offer against current L4 equity bands or discuss the monthly vesting impact, use this www.surl.li/rravhn
Hey can you share your interview experience ? Maybe just about the Depth in Specialization (Coding) round ?
Do you have interview experience post ?  It would be a big help.

Current CTC low ?

Bro 3 years with 38 LPA , feels low ?
